Notice Of Hearing Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Elias Fakhoury, Esq. Hershey Law 310-929-2190 for Plaintiff.
Seth Weiner, Esq. 925-487-5607 for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Mr. Fakhoury contests the stay of claims on sexual harrassment. Mr. Weiner responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CYBERNET ENTERTAINMENT LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After the hearing, an ORDER GRANTING IN PART AND DENYING IN PART DEFENDANT CYBERNET ENTERTAINMENT LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION is filed.***

Notice Of Hearing Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Continued To Apr-13-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
